name: redactd-design-loop
description: Official Codex plugin for running Redactd Design Loop on Redactd JSON artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Critique and iterate Redactd JSON artifacts inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Run Redactd Design Loop against attached Redactd JSON artifacts. The plugin prepares a local run, loads packaged user and stakeholder personas, asks Codex to review the artifact, writes structured critique and iteration outputs, and can save the strongest Redactd JSON result for import.
defaultPrompt: Run Loop on this Redactd JSON.
Critique this artifact with users and stakeholders.
Create safer and bolder iterations of this UI.
